titles.text: 蒼き伝説 シュート！

descriptions.text: 「蒼き伝説シュート！」は、1990年11月9日から1991年12月22日までフジテレビで放送された東映アニメーション制作の日本のアニメで、全58話があります。このゲームにはエキシビションモード、アニメスタイルのストーリーモード、さまざまなオプションがあり、すべて日本語で提供されているため、質の高いプレイのためにはこの言語の読み書きが強く推奨されます。ゲームが始まると、アクションはアーケードサッカーゲームに似た横視点で進行します。

Aoki Densetsu Shoot! is a Japanese anime produced by Toei Animation between November 9, 1990 and December 22, 1991 on the Fuji TV television network; there were fifty-eight episodes. The game has an exhibition mode, an anime-style story mode, and a variety of options, which is entirely in Japanese, so literacy in this language is strongly recommended for quality gameplay. Once the game begins, the action progresses in a side view, similar to an arcade soccer game.

Shoot! (Japanese: シュート!, Hepburn: Shūto) is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Tsukasa Ōshima. It was published in Kodansha's Weekly Shōnen Magazine between 1990 and 2003. The story revolves around a boy named Toshihiko Tanaka, who had just started at Kakegawa High School in order to play association football with his idol, Yoshiharu Kubo. Toshi's friends were not interested in playing football again until he convinces them to join the team and soon the team would enter the All-Japan High School Championship.
A 58-episode anime television series adaptation titled Aoki Densetsu Shoot! (蒼き伝説 シュート!, Aoki Densetsu Shūto!; lit. 'Blue Legend – Shoot!') was produced by Toei Animation and broadcast between November 7, 1993, and December 25, 1994, on Fuji Television. A brand-new original anime television series by EMT Squared and Magic Bus titled Shoot! Goal to the Future (シュート！Goal to the Future) aired from July 2 to September 24, 2022, on AT-X, Tokyo MX, TV Shizuoka, ytv, BS NTV, and BS Fuji. Noriyuki Nakamura directed the series alongside Junichi Kitamura serving as assistant director, Mitsutaka Hirota writing the scripts, and Yukiko Akiyama designing the characters. Crun
《足球風雲》（日語：蒼き伝説　シュート!）是大島司關於足球的日本漫畫作品，先後推出電視動畫版、OVA劇場版、真人電影版及遊戲軟體。作品日文原名為「シュート!」，動畫版名為「蒼き伝説　シュート!」
